notes: No new influenza HPMI papers found within the 3-day scan window (March 8-11, 2026) that were not already processed in previous scans (2026-03-10, 2026-03-11 first and second runs). All 22 previously identified papers were re-encountered in web searches. The bioRxiv API remains blocked by egress proxy, limiting exhaustive coverage. Two potentially relevant papers from outside the scan window were noted for future reference.

papers_of_interest_outside_window.title: IFIT3 RNA-binding activity promotes influenza A virus infection and translation efficiency
papers_of_interest_outside_window.annotation: IFIT3 identified as pro-viral host factor during IAV infection, counterintuitively. Direct IFIT3-RNA interactions modulate translation of viral mRNAs. V2 revision detected but posting date unclear — may warrant inclusion in future scans if recently updated.

papers_of_interest_outside_window.title: Snapshot of in-cell protein contact sites reveals new host factors and hijacking of paraspeckles during influenza A virus infection
papers_of_interest_outside_window.annotation: In-cell cross-linking MS captures vast protein-protein contact network during IAV infection. Identifies new host factors and shows IAV progressively disrupts paraspeckles. Highly relevant to HPMI but posted March 2025 — outside scan window. Cross-references well with Host RBP Network paper.
